summary: Major fix session — upload broken (GitHub 1MB limit + binary decrypt mismatch), render broken (re-open from vault used decryptJSON on binary data), added 2D viewer, added analysis refinement chat, added 3MF/AMF loaders, fixed crypto toB64 stack overflow.

fixes.upload_broken: Files were encrypted with encryptBinary and written to GitHub via Contents API. Two bugs: (1) crypto.toB64 used spread operator which causes stack overflow on large buffers. (2) GitHub Contents API has a ~1MB limit — most CAD files exceed this. Fix: (1) toB64 now uses a loop. (2) Files now stored in IndexedDB as primary storage (no size limit, no network). GitHub backup is attempted silently but failures are non-fatal.
fixes.render_broken_from_vault: openInViewer called readEncrypted (decryptJSON) to retrieve files, but they were written with writeBinaryEncrypted (encryptBinary). decryptJSON tried to TextDecoder + JSON.parse a raw binary — crashed. Fix: added readBinaryEncrypted to github-sync.js that calls decryptBinary. openInViewer now reads from IndexedDB first (fast), falls back to GitHub vault with readBinaryEncrypted, caches result in IDB.
fixes.2d_viewer: Added Group F (2D) formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, BMP, WebP, TIFF, SVG, PDF. load2D() renders images as , SVG inline, PDF in
fixes.analysis_chat: Bottom panel split into left (report) + right (290px refinement chat). chatRefine() in analysis.js calls analyseFileChat() in ai-router.js — 70B model with the full report as system context. User can ask to focus on structural issues, change perspective, re-analyse as interior, etc.
fixes.new_formats: 3MFLoader and AMFLoader added to Three.js bootstrap (window.__TL). lwo/x3d changed to fallback (removed from Three.js r157/r152). SKP changed to fallback.
fixes.sw_cache: SW version bumped to pandaai-v3. Added 3MFLoader and AMFLoader CDN paths to pre-cache list.

messages.content: it wont upload files, it wont render, add 2d and other bim files to be compatible, add analysis chat box alongside the report. push local changes first then pull.

Diagnosed root causes: (1) upload broken by GitHub 1MB Contents API limit + toB64 stack overflow on large buffers. (2) render broken on re-open because readEncrypted used decryptJSON but files were encrypted with encryptBinary. Fixed all: IndexedDB as primary file store, readBinaryEncrypted added, 2D viewer for images/SVG/PDF, analysis refinement chat panel, 3MF/AMF loaders added. 8 files changed.
